children.text: Stay on top of purchase activity. Receive immediate transaction alerts delivered directly to your mobile device when purchase activity occurs on your BBVA Compass Credit Card or Debit Card.
Temporarily disable your BBVA Compass credit or debit card within your Notifications & Alerts with our card block feature, if you see questionable activity.
Redeem credit card rewards in real–time at any merchant
Redeem your credit card rewards conveniently within your Notification & Alerts. Simply open your alert and select 'Redeem Now'.
You do not have any transaction alerts
For greater control and security, every time you make a purchase with any of your cards, you will receive a message about the transaction you have just performed.
